name: dogma
description: Cursor-style computational biology IDE and co-scientist with methods-graph guardrails.

commands.title: Dogma: Open Local Biological Edge Guardrails
Dogma: Generate Local Service Assistant Context
Dogma: Generate quration Edge Evaluation Plan
Dogma: Generate quration Edge Work Package
Dogma: Suggest From quration Edge Work Package
Dogma: Preview quration Edge Suggested Patch
Dogma: Generate quration Edge Patch Handoff
Dogma: Apply quration Edge Suggested Patch
Dogma: Open quration Canvas From Workspace
Dogma: Generate Local Service Run Plan
Dogma: Preview Local Service Dry Run
Dogma: Execute Local Service Dry Run
Dogma: Generate Local Service Patch Proposals
Dogma: Preview Local Service Patch Apply
Dogma: Trust Workspace For Local Operations
Dogma: Apply Sample Sheet Validation Patch

dogma.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of candidate workspace files to scan.

dogma.enableHumanDataWarnings.description: Warn when metadata indicates human data without explicit privacy posture.

dogma.serviceMode.description: Controls whether Dogma scans use the local companion service. Use auto to start/reuse the bundled service for user-triggered scans and fall back locally, off for in-extension scans, or required to fail when the service is unavailable.

dogma.serviceUrl.description: Base URL for the Dogma local companion service.

dogma.serviceTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for Dogma local service requests.

dogma.executionTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for explicitly requested local-service dry-run/stub-run execution.

dogma.servicePython.description: Python executable used by Dogma: Start Local Service.

dogma.serviceModule.description: Python module used to start the Dogma local companion service. The old biocursor_service module remains available as a compatibility alias.

dogma.serviceCwd.description: Working directory for starting the Dogma local service. Use auto to prefer the bundled VSIX python-service, then sibling/dev service folders, then the workspace Python environment.

dogma.serviceStartupWaitMs.description: Maximum time to wait for the local service health check after starting it.

dogma.agentProvider.description: Local provider used for guarded Dogma agent suggestions. Use claude_subscription to call the local Claude Code CLI through the Python sidecar.

dogma.agentModel.description: Claude model alias used for Dogma agent suggestions.

dogma.agentTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for local Dogma agent suggestion LLM calls.

dogma.claudeCliPath.description: Claude Code CLI path used by the local Python sidecar for agent suggestions.

dogma.qurationUrl.description: quration graph web UI URL. Dogma opens this as the canonical graph surface after exporting .dogma/quration-handoff.json.

dogma.qurationApiUrl.description: quration backend API URL used by Dogma: Import Workspace To quration for POST /hypothesis/build.

dogma.qurationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for quration backend import requests.
